notes.run_dev: npm run dev  — starts Vite dev server at localhost:5173
notes.type_check: npm run check  — type-checks all .tsx files
notes.why_no_ts_node: React files use JSX which requires a bundler (Vite). Unlike plain TS files, .tsx cannot run with ts-node directly.

files.01-jsx-and-components.tsx: Day 12 — JSX deep dive, components, props
files.07-state-management.tsx: Day 16 — Context advanced, Zustand, React Query
files.08-react-patterns.tsx: Day 17a — Compound, HOC, Render Props, Headless
files.10-testing.tsx: Day 17c — Testing Library, hooks, integration tests
files.11-practice.tsx: Days 12-17 — Easy / Medium / Hard practice Q&A
